templates.name: Cloudflare App Builder
templates.description: An agent that builds full-stack web apps on Cloudflare Workers — React + Vite SPA with a Worker API backend — and ships every project to GitHub. It builds; it does not deploy.

templates.name: Cloudflare Deployment Engineer
templates.description: An agent that deploys any Cloudflare Workers app straight from its GitHub repo, using the terminal — gh + wrangler with sandbox-exposed credentials, no bespoke tools.

templates.name: Writing a PRD
templates.description: A playbook for writing product requirements documents that lead with the decision.

templates.name: Cloudflare Deploy
templates.description: Deploy a Cloudflare Worker with wrangler, using credentials from the environment.
